title: Surgeon Vacancy at 3M India Healthcare - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at 3M India Healthcare - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
3M India Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 3M India Healthcare:
3M India Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare!
